rationale: Romania's domestic political situation with a new PM nominee remains the most impactful ongoing story; regional security and energy price uncertainty continue as background.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: A new PM candidate has been nominated to form a government in Romania. The outcome of the confidence vote will determine economic and EU policy direction for Romanian citizens.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal uncertainty and Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Ongoing uncertainty over a US-Iran deal, compounded by Israeli strikes on Beirut, keeps energy prices volatile — indirectly affecting Romanian household energy costs.

top_events.title: UK seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Seizure of a Russian sanctions-evading tanker by UK forces is a positive signal for Black Sea regional security and enforcement of the sanctions regime relevant to Romania.
